latHint: Think ranks or levels in a system - not a wedding cake.
pivHint: A wedding cake rises in TIERS - but a pricing system with TIERS has different what?
winText: Step by step. TIERS was the pivot - wedding cake layers to LEVEL upon LEVEL in a system.
lossText: LEVEL - a rank or tier. TIERS was the pivot: wedding cake layers to system LEVEL.
